---
title: Precipitation Extremes and Water Vapor
pagetitle: 2022-3-1-Neelin2022 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2022
author: J. David Neelin, Cristian Martinez-Villalobos, Samuel N Stechmann, Fiaz Ahmed,
  Gang Chen, Jesse Norris, Yi-Hung Kuo and Geert Lenderink
venue: Current Climate Change Reports
venue_cit: <i>Current Climate Change Reports</i>, 8, 17--33, doi:10.1007/s40641-021-00177-z.
recommended_citation: 'J. David Neelin, Cristian Martinez-Villalobos, Samuel N Stechmann,
  Fiaz Ahmed, Gang Chen, Jesse Norris, Yi-Hung Kuo and Geert Lenderink, 2022: Precipitation
  Extremes and Water Vapor, <i>Current Climate Change Reports</i>, 8, 17--33, doi:10.1007/s40641-021-00177-z.'
paper_url: https://link.springer.com/10.1007/s40641-021-00177-z
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Precipitation Extremes and Water Vapor

*Published in Current Climate Change Reports, 2022*

**Recommended citation:** J. David Neelin, Cristian Martinez-Villalobos, Samuel N Stechmann, Fiaz Ahmed, Gang Chen, Jesse Norris, Yi-Hung Kuo and Geert Lenderink, 2022: Precipitation Extremes and Water Vapor, <i>Current Climate Change Reports</i>, 8, 17--33, doi:10.1007/s40641-021-00177-z.

[Download paper](https://link.springer.com/10.1007/s40641-021-00177-z){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
